scenario_desc: Customer wants to transfer funds from one account to another account at the same bank by the same person/member

goal.description: Agent identified the customer's name successfully.
Show the customer's all account numbers successfully.
Agent asked the customer to select the account to transfer funds from.
Agent asked the customer to select the account to transfer funds to.
Agent asked the customer to provide the amount to transfer.
Agent confirmed the transfer details with the customer.
Agent completed the funds transfer successfully.
